authors: Bin Chen Anfan Chen Shuning Lu a The University of Hong Kong
raw_title: Buzz Across Borders: Analyzing the Global and Local Dynamics Shaping the ChatGPT Media Hype in China
title_en: Buzz Across Borders: Analyzing the Global and Local Dynamics Shaping the ChatGPT Media Hype in China
title_zh: 跨越边界的喧嚣：分析塑造中国ChatGPT媒体热潮的全球与本土动态
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究分析了ChatGPT在中国引发的媒体热潮，探讨了全球趋势和本地因素如何共同影响这一现象。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes the media hype around ChatGPT in China, examining how global trends and local factors interact to shape this phenomenon.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代中人工智能技术（如ChatGPT）的媒体传播与社会影响，特别关注跨国语境下的文化适应与政策互动。
research_direction_en: Investigating the media dissemination and societal impact of AI technologies like ChatGPT in the digital age, with a focus on cultural adaptation and policy interactions in transnational contexts.
